chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Muhammad<sup>asws </sup>(11th Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (388/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (388/ 3)
text: قَالَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) صَاحِبُكُمْ بَعْدِيَ الَّذِي يُصَلِّي عَلَيَّ قَالَ وَ لَمْ نَعْرِفْ أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ قَالَ فَخَرَجَ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ فَصَلَّى عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Bashhar Bin Ahmad, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Isfahany who said,

‘Abu Al-Hassanasws said: ‘Your Masterasws after measws is the one who would pray Salat over measws’, and we did not know Abu Muhammadasws before that. So Abu Muhammadasws came out and prayed Salat over himasws’.
en.sarwar: 3. From him has narrated from Bashshar ibn Ahmad from ‘Abdallah ibn Muhammad al-Isfahani who has said the following. “Abu al-Hassan (a.s.) said, “Your master (Imam) after me will be the one who will perform prayer for me (prayer for burial).” The narrator has said that we did not know abu Muhammad (a.s.) before this. Abu Muhammad came out and prayed (for his burial).”
